languageStrings.LBL_AIPROMPTS_DESCRIPTION: Define default AI prompts for CRM actions
languageStrings.LBL_DUPLICATE_ACTION_KEY: A system prompt for this action already exists
languageStrings.LBL_AI_PROVIDER_DESCRIPTION: OpenAI API key and model for CRM AI actions
languageStrings.LBL_AI_API_KEY_STORED_PLACEHOLDER: Saved key is in use — leave empty to keep it
languageStrings.LBL_AI_API_KEY_KEEP_HINT: Leave empty to keep the stored key. Paste a new sk-… key only when rotating.
languageStrings.LBL_AI_MODEL_HELP: Choose a chat model, or fetch the live list from OpenAI with your API key.
languageStrings.LBL_AI_API_KEY_MISSING: OpenAI API key is not configured. Set it in Settings → AI Provider.
languageStrings.LBL_AI_API_KEY_INVALID: API key must start with sk-
languageStrings.LBL_AI_HTTP_FAILED: Could not reach OpenAI. Try again later.
languageStrings.LBL_AI_REQUEST_ENCODE_FAILED: Could not prepare the AI request

jsLanguageStrings.JS_SAVE_FAILED: Could not save the prompt. Try again.
jsLanguageStrings.JS_AI_FETCH_MODELS_HINT: Load chat models available for this API key
jsLanguageStrings.JS_AI_FETCH_MODELS_NEED_KEY: Enter or keep a stored OpenAI API key first
jsLanguageStrings.JS_AI_FETCH_MODELS_FAILED: Could not fetch models from OpenAI
